rulings.Case Title: BAATAR YADAMBAT ET AL VS. RONG LI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deposition Responses On Identity Of Witnesses
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday Aug 6, 2018 line 1. DEFENDANT RONG LI Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deposition Responses On Identity Of Witnesses GRANTED. Plaintiff shall provide contract information for the witness to Defendant within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Request(s) for sanctions denied. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PARK LANE ASSOCIATES, LP, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. JOSEPH ALIOTO, AN INDIVIDUAL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Post Judgment And Appellate Attorneys Fees
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday Aug 6, 2018 line 2. PLAINTIFF PARK LANE ASSOCIATES, LP, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED Notice Of Motion And Motion For Post Judgment And Appellate Attorneys Fees continued to August 16, 2018 per stipulation and order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ERIK VAN DEN AKKER VS. JULIO CAESAR CARMONA
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday Aug 6, 2018 line 3. DEFENDANT JULIO CARMONA DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, complaint sufficiently states a cause of action for unlawful detainer and is not uncertain. Whether the tenancy is subject to SFRO and whether Plaintiff complied with SFRO is a question of fact not appropriate for demurrer. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LEONARD SIMONETTI VS. CLAUDIA VASQUEZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday Aug 6, 2018 line 4. DEFENDANT CLAUDIA VASQUEZ DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege in good faith compliance with Regulation 12.14(b)(8)(i), (iii)-(iv). Plaintiff shall also attach a copy of the timely served compliant declaration. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. KAI COBBINS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday Aug 6, 2018 line 5. PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OFF CALENDAR, action settled. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 1549 OCEAN AVENUE, LLC VS. ASHLEY THOMAS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion By Defendant Ashley Thomas To Quash Service Of Unlawful Detainer Summons
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday Aug 6, 2018 line 6. DEFENDANT ASHLEY THOMAS Notice Of Motion And Motion By Defendant Ashley Thomas To Quash Service Of Unlawful Detainer Summons DENIED. Defendant properly served in accordance with CCP 415.45 by posting and mailing by certified mail with a tracking number. CCP 1013 is not applicable to service made pursuant to CCP 415.45, which is located in a different chapter (See CCP 1013(b)). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MOLLY W FONG VS. JONATHAN RAISOR ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday Aug 6, 2018 line 7. DEFENDANT JONATHAN RAISOR DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)
